title: lamium galeobdolon subsp. montanum
intro: Lamium galeobdolon subsp. montanum, also known as yellow archangel or wood betony, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family, native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lamium galeobdolon subsp. montanum include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its bioactive compounds.
